chapter_title: Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
In this chapter:

(1) “Commission” means the Texas Transportation Commission.

(2) “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 622. Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 622.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Commission” means the Texas Transportation Commission.

    (2) “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 65, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: “Department” means the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles.

history.raw: Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 65, eff. September 1, 2011.
